framework.name: RAND Five Anti-Patterns of AI Failure
framework.description: RAND interviewed 65 experienced data scientists/engineers and identified 5 root causes: (1) misunderstood problem definition, (2) insufficient training data, (3) technology-first vs problem-first thinking, (4) inadequate infrastructure for data governance and model deployment, (5) applying AI to problems too difficult for AI. Notably, #1 (miscommunication) is the MOST common cause — not technical failure.
framework.raw_quote: Misunderstandings and miscommunications about the intent and purpose of the project are the most common reasons for AI project failure.

source.title: The Root Causes of Failure for Artificial Intelligence Projects and How They ...
